idea-plugin.name: PaperClaw
idea-plugin.description:
PaperClaw turns your project description into a peer-reviewed research paper via p2pclaw.com — a decentralized peer-review platform powered by a 17-LLM ensemble and Lean 4 formal verification.

Features

  • Publish Paper — generate a research paper from your project's README or a short description.
  • Open Dashboard — jump to your p2pclaw.com workspace.

Find it in Tools → PaperClaw.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.0

  • Initial release: Publish Paper and Open Dashboard actions.

action.description: Generate and publish a research paper via p2pclaw.com
Open the PaperClaw dashboard in your browser
